verses.latin_vulgate: Statera dolosa abominatio est apud Dominum,  et pondus æquum voluntas ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹאזְנֵ֣י מִ֭רְמָה תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאֶ֖בֶן שְׁלֵמָ֣ה רְצוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: A false balance is abomination to the Lord: but a just weight is his delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi fuerit superbia, ibi erit et contumelia ;  ubi autem est humilitas, ibi et sapientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּֽא־זָ֭דוֹן וַיָּבֹ֣א קָל֑וֹן וְֽאֶת־צְנוּעִ֥ים חׇכְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: When pride cometh, then cometh shame: but with the lowly is wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Simplicitas justorum diriget eos,  et supplantatio perversorum vastabit illos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֻּמַּ֣ת יְשָׁרִ֣ים תַּנְחֵ֑ם וְסֶ֖לֶף בֹּגְדִ֣ים (ושדם) [יְשׇׁדֵּֽם]׃
verses.king_james: The integrity of the upright shall guide them: but the perverseness of transgressors shall destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non proderunt divitiæ in die ultionis ;  justitia autem liberabit a morte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יוֹעִ֣יל ה֭וֹן בְּי֣וֹם עֶבְרָ֑ה וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה תַּצִּ֥יל מִמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.king_james: Riches profit not in the day of wrath: but righteousness delivereth from death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia simplicis diriget viam ejus,  et in impietate sua corruet impius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צִדְקַ֣ת תָּ֭מִים תְּיַשֵּׁ֣ר דַּרְכּ֑וֹ וּ֝בְרִשְׁעָת֗וֹ יִפֹּ֥ל רָשָֽׁע׃
verses.king_james: The righteousness of the perfect shall direct his way: but the wicked shall fall by his own wickedness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia rectorum liberabit eos,  et in insidiis suis capientur iniqui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צִדְקַ֣ת יְ֭שָׁרִים תַּצִּילֵ֑ם וּ֝בְהַוַּ֗ת בֹּגְדִ֥ים יִלָּכֵֽדוּ׃
verses.king_james: The righteousness of the upright shall deliver them: but transgressors shall be taken in their own naughtiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortuo homine impio, nulla erit ultra spes,  et exspectatio sollicitorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּמ֤וֹת אָדָ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע תֹּאבַ֣ד תִּקְוָ֑ה וְתוֹחֶ֖לֶת אוֹנִ֣ים אָבָֽדָה׃
verses.king_james: When a wicked man dieth, his expectation shall perish: and the hope of unjust men perisheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus de angustia liberatus est,  et tradetur impius pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַ֭דִּיק מִצָּרָ֣ה נֶחֱלָ֑ץ וַיָּבֹ֖א רָשָׁ֣ע תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The righteous is delivered out of trouble, and the wicked cometh in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Simulator ore decipit amicum suum ;  justi autem liberabuntur scientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּפֶ֗ה חָ֭נֵף יַשְׁחִ֣ת רֵעֵ֑הוּ וּ֝בְדַ֗עַת צַדִּיקִ֥ים יֵחָלֵֽצוּ׃
verses.king_james: An hypocrite with his mouth destroyeth his neighbour: but through knowledge shall the just be delivered.

verses.latin_vulgate: In bonis justorum exsultabit civitas,  et in perditione impiorum erit laudatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּט֣וּב צַ֭דִּיקִים תַּעֲלֹ֣ץ קִרְיָ֑ה וּבַאֲבֹ֖ד רְשָׁעִ֣ים רִנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: When it goeth well with the righteous, the city rejoiceth: and when the wicked perish, there is shouting.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictione justorum exaltabitur civitas,  et ore impiorum subvertetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּבִרְכַּ֣ת יְ֭שָׁרִים תָּר֣וּם קָ֑רֶת וּבְפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תֵּהָרֵֽס׃
verses.king_james: By the blessing of the upright the city is exalted: but it is overthrown by the mouth of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui despicit amicum suum indigens corde est ;  vir autem prudens tacebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בׇּז־לְרֵעֵ֥הוּ חֲסַר־לֵ֑ב וְאִ֖ישׁ תְּבוּנ֣וֹת יַחֲרִֽישׁ׃
verses.king_james: He that is void of wisdom despiseth his neighbour: but a man of understanding holdeth his peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ambulat fraudulenter, revelat arcana ;  qui autem fidelis est animi, celat amici commissum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹלֵ֣ךְ רָ֭כִיל מְגַלֶּה־סּ֑וֹד וְנֶאֱמַן־ר֝֗וּחַ מְכַסֶּ֥ה דָבָֽר׃
verses.king_james: A talebearer revealeth secrets: but he that is of a faithful spirit concealeth the matter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi non est gubernator, populus corruet ;  salus autem, ubi multa consilia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּאֵ֣ין תַּ֭חְבֻּלוֹת יִפׇּל־עָ֑ם וּ֝תְשׁוּעָ֗ה בְּרֹ֣ב יוֹעֵֽץ׃
verses.king_james: Where no counsel is, the people fall: but in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.

verses.latin_vulgate: Affligetur malo qui fidem facit pro extraneo ;  qui autem cavet laqueos securus erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַע־יֵ֭רוֹעַ כִּי־עָ֣רַב זָ֑ר וְשֹׂנֵ֖א תֹקְעִ֣ים בּוֹטֵֽחַ׃
verses.king_james: He that is surety for a stranger shall smart for it: and he that hateth suretiship is sure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mulier gratiosa inveniet gloriam,  et robusti habebunt divitias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵֽשֶׁת־חֵ֭ן תִּתְמֹ֣ךְ כָּב֑וֹד וְ֝עָרִיצִ֗ים יִתְמְכוּ־עֹֽשֶׁר׃
verses.king_james: A gracious woman retaineth honour: and strong men retain riches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benefacit animæ suæ vir misericors ;  qui autem crudelis est, etiam propinquos abjicit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֹּמֵ֣ל נַ֭פְשׁוֹ אִ֣ישׁ חָ֑סֶד וְעֹכֵ֥ר שְׁ֝אֵר֗וֹ אַכְזָרִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The merciful man doeth good to his own soul: but he that is cruel troubleth his own flesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Impius facit opus instabile,  seminanti autem justitiam merces fidelis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָשָׁ֗ע עֹשֶׂ֥ה פְעֻלַּת־שָׁ֑קֶר וְזֹרֵ֥עַ צְ֝דָקָ֗ה שֶׂ֣כֶר אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.king_james: The wicked worketh a deceitful work: but to him that soweth righteousness shall be a sure reward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clementia præparat vitam,  et sectatio malorum mortem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֵּן־צְדָקָ֥ה לְחַיִּ֑ים וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף רָעָ֣ה לְמוֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: As righteousness tendeth to life: so he that pursueth evil pursueth it to his own death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abominabile Domino cor pravum,  et voluntas ejus in iis qui simpliciter ambulant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה עִקְּשֵׁי־לֵ֑ב וּ֝רְצוֹנ֗וֹ תְּמִ֣ימֵי דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: They that are of a froward heart are abomination to the Lord: but such as are upright in their way are his delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus in manu non erit innocens malus ;  semen autem justorum salvabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֣ד לְ֭יָד לֹא־יִנָּ֣קֶה רָּ֑ע וְזֶ֖רַע צַדִּיקִ֣ים נִמְלָֽט׃
verses.king_james: Though hand join in hand, the wicked shall not be unpunished: but the seed of the righteous shall be delivered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circulus aureus in naribus suis,  mulier pulchra et fatua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֶ֣זֶם זָ֭הָב בְּאַ֣ף חֲזִ֑יר אִשָּׁ֥ה יָ֝פָ֗ה וְסָ֣רַת טָֽעַם׃
verses.king_james: As a jewel of gold in a swine’s snout, so is a fair woman which is without discretion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desiderium justorum omne bonum est ;  præstolatio impiorum furor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּאֲוַ֣ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים אַךְ־ט֑וֹב תִּקְוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים עֶבְרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The desire of the righteous is only good: but the expectation of the wicked is wrath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Alii dividunt propria, et ditiores fiunt ;  alii rapiunt non sua, et semper in egestate sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֣שׁ מְ֭פַזֵּר וְנוֹסָ֥ף ע֑וֹד וְחֹשֵׂ֥ךְ מִ֝יֹּ֗שֶׁר אַךְ־לְמַחְסֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: There is that scattereth, and yet increaseth; and there is that withholdeth more than is meet, but it tendeth to poverty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anima quæ benedicit impinguabitur,  et qui inebriat, ipse quoque inebriabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֶֽפֶשׁ־בְּרָכָ֥ה תְדֻשָּׁ֑ן וּ֝מַרְוֶ֗ה גַּם־ה֥וּא יוֹרֶֽא׃
verses.king_james: The liberal soul shall be made fat: and he that watereth shall be watered also himself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui abscondit frumenta maledicetur in populis ;  benedictio autem super caput vendentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹ֣נֵֽעַ בָּ֭ר יִקְּבֻ֣הוּ לְא֑וֹם וּ֝בְרָכָ֗ה לְרֹ֣אשׁ מַשְׁבִּֽיר׃
verses.king_james: He that withholdeth corn, the people shall curse him: but blessing shall be upon the head of him that selleth it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bene consurgit diluculo qui quærit bona ;  qui autem investigator malorum est, opprimetur ab eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׁ֣חֵֽר ט֭וֹב יְבַקֵּ֣שׁ רָצ֑וֹן וְדֹרֵ֖שׁ רָעָ֣ה תְבוֹאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: He that diligently seeketh good procureth favour: but he that seeketh mischief, it shall come unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui confidit in divitiis suis corruet :  justi autem quasi virens folium germinabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בּוֹטֵ֣חַ בְּ֭עׇשְׁרוֹ ה֣וּא יִפּ֑וֹל וְ֝כֶעָלֶ֗ה צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִפְרָֽחוּ׃
verses.king_james: He that trusteth in his riches shall fall: but the righteous shall flourish as a branch.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui conturbat domum suam possidebit ventos,  et qui stultus est serviet sapienti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹכֵ֣ר בֵּ֭יתוֹ יִנְחַל־ר֑וּחַ וְעֶ֥בֶד אֱ֝וִ֗יל לַֽחֲכַם־לֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: He that troubleth his own house shall inherit the wind: and the fool shall be servant to the wise of heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fructus justi lignum vitæ,  et qui suscipit animas sapiens est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּֽרִי־צַ֭דִּיק עֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים וְלֹקֵ֖חַ נְפָשׁ֣וֹת חָכָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life; and he that winneth souls is wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si justus in terra recipit,  quanto magis impius et peccator !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֣ן צַ֭דִּיק בָּאָ֣רֶץ יְשֻׁלָּ֑ם אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־רָשָׁ֥ע וְחוֹטֵֽא׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the righteous shall be recompensed in the earth: much more the wicked and the sinner.
